agentmail-sdk.description: Deprecated alias of the agentmail skill, kept so existing installs and pinned URLs keep resolving. Prefer installing agentmail; this is an identical generated copy covering AgentMail SDK usage in TypeScript and Python.

stubs.references/full-api-reference.md:
# Moved

The API trap list now lives in the [SKILL.md API gotchas section](../SKILL.md); full per-language usage is in [python.md](python.md) and [typescript.md](typescript.md).

email-for-ai-agents.description: Deprecated alias of the agent-email-patterns skill, kept so existing installs and pinned URLs keep resolving. Prefer installing agent-email-patterns; this is an identical generated copy covering agent email architecture, security, and provider tradeoffs.

stubs.references/security-risks.md:
# Moved

The security content now lives in [threat-model.md](threat-model.md).
stubs.references/infrastructure-comparison.md:
# Moved

Durable provider constraints now live in the [SKILL.md Provider landscape section](../SKILL.md).

agentmail.name: AgentMail SDK
agentmail.prompt: Use $agentmail to implement a current AgentMail SDK workflow.

agentmail-cli.name: AgentMail CLI
agentmail-cli.prompt: Use $agentmail-cli to run AgentMail operations from the terminal.

agentmail-mcp.name: AgentMail MCP Setup
agentmail-mcp.prompt: Use $agentmail-mcp to configure or troubleshoot the AgentMail MCP connection.

agentmail-toolkit.name: AgentMail Toolkit
agentmail-toolkit.short: Add AgentMail tools to agent frameworks
agentmail-toolkit.prompt: Use $agentmail-toolkit to wire AgentMail into an agent framework.

agent-email-patterns.name: Agent Email Patterns
agent-email-patterns.prompt: Use $agent-email-patterns to design the agent email architecture and threat model.

agentmail-send-email.name: Send Email
agentmail-send-email.prompt: Use $send-email to prepare and send an AgentMail message safely.

agentmail-check-email.name: Check Email
agentmail-check-email.prompt: Use $check-email to read, search, and triage AgentMail messages.

agentmail-manage-inboxes.name: Manage Inboxes
agentmail-manage-inboxes.prompt: Use $manage-inboxes to create, update, or delete AgentMail inboxes.
